title: CapabilityPromotionRecord
description: Record of a capability promotion attempt for a resource. Tracks progression through the R0-R7 promotion gates. R0 cannot approve capability -- promotion_status 'approved' is the maximum status and only maps to capability_approved lifecycle state, not execution or enablement.

record_id.description: Unique record identifier for this promotion attempt.

resource_id.description: Reference to a resource registered in the resource-registry. Must match an existing resource_id.

current_phase.description: The current phase (R0-R7) of the resource. R0 is registration and classification only.

target_phase.description: The target phase (R1-R7 or 'none') for this promotion. 'none' means no further promotion is planned.

promotion_gate.description: The specific promotion gate being attempted. Each gate represents one step in the R0-R7 progression. The chain ends at capability_approved -- there is no 'active' or 'integrated' gate beyond this.

promotion_status.description: Current status of this promotion attempt. 'approved' is the MAXIMUM -- there is no status beyond this. 'approved' here means the specific gate was passed, not that the resource is fully active.

reviewer_decision.description: Human reviewer's decision text or rationale. Empty string if still pending. Must be non-empty when promotion_status is 'approved' or 'rejected'.

human_gate_passed.description: Whether the human gate was explicitly passed. MUST be false if promotion_status is not 'approved'. A value of true when promotion_status is not 'approved' is an invalid state.

forbidden_if.description: Conditions that would block this promotion. Each entry describes a specific blocking condition (e.g., 'path_status is not_found', 'local_verification_status is blocked').

forbidden_if: resource_type must not be 'native_runtime' without human gate
